body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/80325255?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/christos-eth", "id": 80325255, "login": "christos-eth", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgwMzI1MjU1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/christos-eth", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65913", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "## Summary When `USE_PROFILES` is enabled, DOMPurify rebuilds `ALLOWED_ATTR` as a plain array before populating it with the requested allowlists. Because the sanitizer still looks up attributes via `ALLOWED_ATTR[lcName]`, any `Array.prototype` property that is polluted also counts as an allowlisted attribute. An attacker who can set `Array.prototype.onclick = true` (or a runtime already subject to prototype pollution) can thus force DOMPurify to keep event handlers such as `onclick` even when they are normally forbidden. The provided PoC sanitizes `` with `USE_PROFILES` and adds the sanitized output to the DOM; the polluted prototype allows the event handler to survive and execute, turning what should be a blocklist into a silent XSS vector. ## Impact Prototype pollution makes DOMPurify accept dangerous event handler attributes, which bypasses the sanitizer and results in DOM-based XSS once the sanitized markup is rendered. ## Credits Identified by Cantina’s Apex (https://www.cantina.security).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:45:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65913"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:45:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/security/advisories/GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv", "https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/releases/tag/3.3.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/cure53/DOMPurify/security-advisories/GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify", "summary": "DOMPurify USE_PROFILES prototype pollution allows event handlers", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-23T14:04:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj63-jhhr-wcxv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.3.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "dompurify"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: DOMPurify USE_PROFILES prototype pollution allows event handlers
